query:
-- 1. Update all eFax services to correct Access4 wholesale cost of $7.20/month ex GST
-- eFax services are identified by planName containing 'efax' or 'fax' 
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 7.20,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] eFax wholesale cost confirmed at $7.20/month ex GST from Access4 pricebook (Product IDs 599601, 600655)')
WHERE (LOWER(planName) LIKE '%efax%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%e-fax%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%fax service%')
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost != 7.20;

-- 2. Update UCXcel Standard users to $18.00/month (currently may be wrong)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 18.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] UCXcel Standard wholesale cost confirmed at $18.00/month ex GST from Access4 pricebook')
WHERE (LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel standard%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%collaborate standard%')
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost != 18.00;

-- 3. Update UCXcel Premium users to $30.00/month
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 30.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] UCXcel Premium wholesale cost confirmed at $30.00/month ex GST from Access4 pricebook')
WHERE (LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel premium%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%collaborate premium%')
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost != 30.00;

-- 4. Update Common Phone (Lite User) to $3.90/month
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 3.90,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] Common Phone (Lite User) wholesale cost confirmed at $3.90/month ex GST from Access4 pricebook')
WHERE (LOWER(planName) LIKE '%lite user%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%common phone%')
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost != 3.90;

-- 5. Update Executive User to $9.00/month  
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 9.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] Executive User wholesale cost confirmed at $9.00/month ex GST from Access4 pricebook')
WHERE (LOWER(planName) LIKE '%executive user%')
  AND supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost != 9.00;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
